name: Bolt
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Bolt Checkout and Payments
metaTitle: Build AI Agents for Bolt with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Bolt data and approved actions for checkout support, payment operations, and internal workflows with secure Skill Builder setup.
intro: Bolt helps merchants deliver fast, secure checkout and payment experiences. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the Bolt workflow you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a secure reusable Skill for customer support or internal team agents. That means your AI agent can answer questions, look up payment or checkout details, prepare handoffs, and take approved actions inside clear rules.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up Bolt checkout or payment status so it can answer order and payment questions in real time.
Use a DocsBot helpdesk agent to summarize a customer’s Bolt transaction context and prepare a clean handoff for billing or payments specialists.
Enable the agent to collect missing order or checkout details from the customer and use Bolt data to guide the next approved support step.
Allow the agent to identify failed or incomplete checkout situations from Bolt records and explain what the customer can do next.
Have the agent create internal follow-up tasks or escalation notes when a Bolt-related payment issue needs human review or approval.
internalUseCases: Let employees chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or a web chat to retrieve Bolt payment and checkout information without digging through multiple systems.
Enable operations or support teams to ask the agent for summaries of Bolt transaction activity, exception patterns, or customer issue context before taking action.
Use an internal AI assistant to walk employees through payment support SOPs, gather required details, and prepare standardized escalations tied to Bolt records.
Allow finance, support, or customer success teams to use the agent to research checkout issues, generate status summaries, and complete approved follow-up workflows across systems.
Help employees chat with the agent to find the right Bolt-related record, confirm the next policy-compliant step, and trigger bounded actions with approval controls when needed.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that checks Bolt payment or checkout status during live customer conversations.
A billing assistant that summarizes failed checkout context and drafts escalation notes for human review.
An internal operations agent that retrieves Bolt transaction details and guides staff through resolution steps.
A support workflow that gathers customer identifiers and matches them to Bolt records safely.
An AI agent that prepares refund or payment issue handoffs using Bolt context and internal rules.
A private team assistant that answers Bolt operations questions and generates standardized case summaries.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the Bolt agent to do, such as checking payment status, summarizing checkout problems, or preparing escalations, and it turns that goal into a working Skill design.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs safely
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder figures out the required Bolt connection details, defines secure authentication and configuration values, protects and proxies secrets through approved runtime settings, and scopes access to the minimum records and actions needed.

howItWorks.title: Bound actions and approvals
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder adds the right instructions, safe action limits, and approval boundaries so the agent can answer questions, perform approved lookups or updates, and pause for human review on sensitive payment workflows.

howItWorks.title: Test and improve automatically
howItWorks.description: The automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, finds bugs, weak instructions, missing checks, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated self-improvement loop before launch.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once the Skill is ready, Skill Builder helps deploy it to your customer-facing DocsBot chat widget, helpdesk agent, or private internal assistant so teams and customers can use it in the right context.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent for Bolt checkout and payment support?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the support outcome you want in plain language, and it designs a Bolt-connected Skill that can look up payment context, summarize issues, and take approved actions inside your rules. Skill Builder also handles secure configuration, scoped permissions, testing, and deployment.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Bolt data to answer customer payment questions?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot agent can be designed to use Bolt data for safe lookups such as checkout status, payment context, and issue summaries while responding in a website chat widget or helpdesk flow. You control what records and actions are allowed and where approval is required.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can DocsBot automate with Bolt?
faq.answer: Teams can build workflows for payment-status lookups, failed checkout triage, escalation preparation, handoff notes, missing-information collection, and internal follow-up triggers. The goal is to let the AI agent resolve more questions directly and package the rest for faster human review.

faq.question: Can DocsBot create a private internal AI assistant for Bolt operations?
faq.answer: Yes, employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or a web interface to retrieve Bolt information, research issues, follow SOPs, and complete approved operational workflows. This helps support, finance, and operations teams move faster without exposing tools directly to every employee.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Bolt integration workflows secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines the needed configuration, keeps credentials out of chats and generated Skill content, proxies secrets through secure runtime settings, and scopes access to the minimum users, records, and actions required. It can also add approval boundaries so sensitive payment actions do not run without the right review.

faq.question: Can a DocsBot agent update records or trigger actions in Bolt safely?
faq.answer: DocsBot Skills can be designed for bounded actions such as approved updates, workflow triggers, or record-linked handoffs when those actions fit your process. Skill Builder sets safe limits and approval checkpoints so the agent acts only within the permissions and policies you define.

brand.title: Bolt
brand.description: Bolt is a payments technology company that provides businesses with seamless and secure one-click checkout, powering frictionless experiences for retailers and customers. With a network of over 80M US consumers, Bolt unlocks rich insights that drive personalized checkout experiences. The company is expanding its offerings with a Finance & Crypto SuperApp, allowing consumers to manage money and shop across the internet from a single interface.
